Exposes.name: switch_type
Exposes.label: Switch type
Exposes.description: Module controlled by a rocker switch or a button

Exposes.name: power_on_behavior
Exposes.label: Power-on behavior
Exposes.description: Controls the behavior when the device is powered on after power loss

Exposes.name: auto_off_time
Exposes.label: Auto off time
Exposes.description: Turn off the output after the specified amount of time. Only in action when the automatic turn-off is enabled.

Exposes.name: switch_mode
Exposes.label: Switch mode
Exposes.description: Decouple the switch from the corresponding output to use it for other purposes. Please keep in mind that the available options depend on the used switch type.

Exposes.name: reset_energy_meters
Exposes.label: Reset energy meters
Exposes.description: Triggers the reset of all energy meters on the device to 0 kWh

update.latest_release_notes: New option to switch outputs of the Shutter control and bug fixes for certain drives
